messages.speaker: Sarah Lee
messages.text: Thanks for joining, Alice. Let's review where we are on the enterprise plan evaluation.

messages.speaker: Alice Johnson
messages.text: Sure. We've narrowed it down to you and CompetitorX. The main differentiator right now is pricing.

messages.speaker: Sarah Lee
messages.text: Understood. Can you share more about the pricing concern?

messages.speaker: Alice Johnson
messages.text: CompetitorX is offering us per-seat pricing that's about 15% lower. On 200 seats, that adds up.

messages.speaker: Sarah Lee
messages.text: That's fair. We do provide additional value though — dedicated support, SLA guarantees, and the API layer.

messages.speaker: Alice Johnson
messages.text: True, but our VP of Engineering wants to see better API documentation before committing.

messages.speaker: Sarah Lee
messages.text: I'll have our technical writer send over the updated docs by Friday.

messages.speaker: Alice Johnson
messages.text: That would help. Also, any chance of a Salesforce native connector? Right now it's Zapier only.
